case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS RODRIGUEZ, ENILDA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ENILDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ENILDA $254.77 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $280.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
